title: rubus rudis subsp. brevithyrsus
intro: Rubus rudis subsp. brevithyrsus is a subspecies of the wild raspberry plant, scientifically classified as a thorny, perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Rubus rudis subsp. brevithyrsus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting cardiovascular health. This plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies.
